Configuration Required

This app needs a Supabase backend to work. Open index.html and set:

SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY at the top of the script section.

See README.md for full setup instructions.

Choose your role to begin
Host: name your campaign to start a new game, or enter a code to resume one. Players enter the host's code or open the invite link.

Equipment Catalog
Special DM Rules
Write house rules, banned actions, table etiquette, or campaign-specific restrictions. The system will warn players (and you) when a chat message or roll appears to violate one of them. One rule per line works best.
⚠
DM Rule Reminder
Campaign Log
Auto-saved · visible to all players
Read-only · Only the host can edit the log
Danger Zone (host only)
Nothing is auto-deleted. Tokens, maps, log, and characters stay until the host explicitly clears them.
